blog.title: Tourism partnership guide
blog.subtitle: Industry insights, collaboration tips and platform news.
blog.metaDescription: Articles on the tourism B2B marketplace, partnerships and industry insights.
blog.emptyText: The first blog posts will be published soon.

listing.title: Explore suppliers
listing.sub: Filter quickly by category, city, rating and commercial model.
listing.emptyText: Broaden your filters and try again.
listing.mapNote: Demo map · real OSM tiles on deploy
listing.gateText: Guest view only shows the number of matching businesses. Sign in to see supplier cards and full search results.
listing.guestCountText: The B2B business directory opens to verified members only. Direct supplier links remain public; bulk listings require sign-in.
listing.guestUnlockText: Get free access to all {total} suppliers.
listing.guestBannerText: As a guest you only see featured (premium) businesses. Sign in or register free to reach every supplier.
listing.suggestTitle: Also worth a look in this region
listing.suggestSub: Suggestions from categories other than the one you searched.
listing.countryAskTitle: Choose a country to start searching
listing.countryAskText: For keyword search, please pick a country first to narrow results. Choose one below.

supplier.gated: Authorized contact person and detailed quote discussions are members-only.
supplier.memberContactsSub: Verified contact details for speaking directly with this business.
supplier.memberContactsEmpty: This business has not added an authorized contact yet.
supplier.quoteTitle: Get a quote from this supplier
supplier.quoteSub: Send your request and let the company contact you directly.
supplier.partnersSub: Companies this business shows as partners within the platform.
supplier.partnersEmpty: This business has not added any partners yet. Build your own partner network to showcase trusted references on your profile.
supplier.previewTitle: Preview — this listing isn't live yet
supplier.previewSub: Your business is under review. Once approved this page becomes public; for now only you can see it.
supplier.reviewsSubtitle: Rate the partners you have worked with — building trust across the B2B network.
supplier.reviewSelfError: You cannot rate your own business
supplier.reviewLoginRequired: You need to sign in to leave a review.
supplier.reviewsEmpty: No reviews yet. Be the first to leave one.

quote.titleSupplier: Send a request to this supplier
quote.note: Send your request; matching supplier(s) will contact you directly.
quote.name: Full name
quote.phoneFormatHint: Enter the phone number in local format
quote.validUntilHint: Last day suppliers can submit their quote
quote.successDescription: Your request has been shared with matching suppliers. Interested businesses will contact you directly using the details you provided.
quote.successHint: Keep your email and phone notifications enabled to receive responses promptly.
quote.error: Could not send request, please try again.
quote.errorMissing: Check required fields: phone, category, country and city are required.
quote.errorRate: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
quote.errorNoMatch: No live supplier matches these filters.
quote.errorValidUntil: Choose a valid quote deadline that is not in the past.

login.title: Welcome back
login.sub: Log in to access the full supplier list and details.
login.mfaDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
login.mfaInvalid: The code is incorrect or has expired. Try again.

register.title: Create account
register.sub: Registration is free. Your listing goes live indefinitely after admin approval; boost is optional.
register.name: Business name
register.error: Could not create account, please try again.
register.error_rate: Too many attempts. Please try again later (hourly email limit).
register.error_exists: This email is already registered. Try logging in.
register.error_password: Password must be at least 6 characters.
register.checkEmailSub: Confirm your email, then log in to reach your business panel.
register.typeSupplierDesc: Hotel, agency, guide… I want to be listed.
register.typeBuyerDesc: A company looking for suppliers/agencies; I won’t be listed.
register.intentServiceDesc: Hotel, agency, transfer, guide, clinic… I want to be listed.
register.intentAgencyDesc: I get listed and also search suppliers.
register.b1d: Start working with trusted partners right away.
register.b2d: Manage every request from a single screen.
register.b3d: Joining the platform is completely free.
register.sectorOther: If your sector is not listed
register.verifyDesc: We sent a verification link to:
register.verifySpam: Clicking the link activates your account. If it didn’t arrive, check your spam folder.
register.resendFail: Could not send, try again shortly.
register.bizIntro: Buyers find and choose you through these details. Complete profiles rank at the top of search and win far more requests.
register.bizOpenAddressPh: Neighbourhood, street, building and door number
register.bizDescPh: What do you do, what makes you stand out? A few sentences is enough.
register.bizWhatsappTip: Buyers need this to reach you quickly on WhatsApp for quotes and first conversations.
register.bizStrengthHint: Every field pushes you ahead of competitors.
register.bizRequiredHint: Fill in the location, street address and required contact details to continue.
register.bizCoverHint: Buyers see this first · landscape looks best

panel.title: Business Panel
panel.buyerOverviewSub: Discover service providers, save your favorites, and compare options that fit your needs.
panel.buyerFindSub: Compare businesses by category, location, and service type.
panel.buyerFavoritesSub: Save businesses that interest you and review them whenever you need.
panel.buyerRequestSub: Explore suitable businesses and request a quote directly from their profile.
panel.buyerRequestsSub: Track the quote requests you have sent.
panel.buyerRequestsEmpty: You have not sent any quote requests yet.
panel.overviewListingSub: Manage cover image, company details and services in one place.
panel.agencyHero: Create trip requests and compare offers
panel.agencyHeroSub: Enter the region, dates and service need, then track supplier offers in one workspace.
panel.panelReadySub: Keep your profile current, follow incoming requests and visibility status.
panel.panelSetupSub: Add core company details, images and services before going live.
panel.pendingNoticeText: Your profile becomes active in listings and workflows after admin approval.
panel.restrictedNoticeText: Request, offer and visibility actions are limited for this account status.
panel.rejectedNoticeText: Your listing is not visible in search results. Fix the issues and save — your application is automatically sent back for review.
panel.visibilitySub: Publishing is managed by admin approval; profile visibility can be indefinite.
panel.visibilityPublic: Your profile is visible in public lists and reachable from Google.
panel.visibilityPending: Your profile becomes visible after admin approval.
panel.visibilityRestricted: Your profile is not shown in public lists right now.
panel.pendingHint: Your listing goes live once approved.
panel.myBusinessesSub: Manage multiple business profiles from the same account. Each business is published as a separate listing and goes through its own approval flow.
panel.openAddressPlaceholder: Neighbourhood, street, building and door number
panel.listingDashboardPendingSub: Your listing is under admin review. Track its status and missing items here.
panel.listingDashboardLiveSub: Your listing is live. Track requests, visibility and profile quality from this workspace.
panel.listingNextPendingText: You can update profile details and media until approval is complete. After approval, the listing becomes visible in search and showcase areas.
panel.listingNextLiveText: Keep profile quality high, follow incoming quote requests and monitor visibility status.
panel.agencyProfileSub: Complete the agency profile suppliers will see when you create requests.
panel.editSub: Keep your info up to date. Changes are reviewed during approval.
panel.name: Business name
panel.servicesMultiLabel: Services you offer (multi-select — first is primary)
panel.agencyServices: Tour and operation areas you work in
panel.partnersSub: Only mutually approved business partners are shown publicly on your profile. New connections are sent as approval requests.
panel.partnersEmpty: There are no other approved businesses you can invite right now.
panel.partnerAddHint: Search and filter to send a request to the right business.
panel.partnerPickerSub: Search approved businesses, then narrow results by category or city.
panel.partnerConfirmSub: You are about to send a partner request to {name}.
panel.partnerConfirmHint: Once accepted, both businesses can show each other as partners on their profiles.
panel.partnerSendSuccessSub: Waiting for {name} to approve. You can follow it under Sent partner requests.
panel.partnerAlreadyExists: You already have a partner request or connection with this business.
panel.partnerSendError: The request could not be sent. Refresh the page and try again.
panel.guideFieldsSub: These should become dedicated form fields in the next step; for now this shows the required guide profile data.
panel.error: Could not save, please try again.
panel.invalidRegion: Please select a valid country, city and district.
panel.invalidTckn: Invalid national ID (TCKN). Please check the 11-digit number.
panel.invalidTaxNo: Invalid tax number. Please check the 10-digit number.
panel.contactsSub: People authorised to be contacted on behalf of the business. This information is never shown on the public profile.
panel.agencyWorkSub: Request creation and offer collection flow.
panel.agencyStep1: Create a new request with region, dates, group size and service type.
panel.agencyStep2: Compare incoming offers by price, capacity and supplier quality.
panel.agencyStep3: Save preferred suppliers to favorites and reuse them in later operations.
panel.supplierWorkSub: Profile visibility and incoming request management.
panel.supplierStep1: Complete profile, documents, gallery and service attributes.
panel.supplierStep2: Track agency requests and send offers when there is a fit.
panel.supplierStep3: Monitor views, visibility and boost status regularly.
panel.noAgencyRequests: No requests yet. Once you create the first request, incoming offers will be compared here.
panel.quotesInboxHint: Your reply is delivered to the requester through Tourism Partner as a branded email. When they reply, it reaches you directly.
panel.quoteReplyPlaceholder: Write your price quote and note…
panel.quoteReplyFailedSend: Email could not be sent, please try again.
panel.quoteReplyNoRecipient: This request has no valid email address.
panel.documentsSub: Upload the documents required for your category (PDF or image). Items marked (*) are mandatory.
panel.workRegionsHint: Pick the cities you serve; agencies find you in these regions
panel.requestsProfileRequired: Complete your business registration before creating requests or submitting quotes.
panel.requestsDescription: Create a request for your region and receive quotes from relevant suppliers. You can also quote on open requests.
panel.requestsTitlePlaceholder: E.g. Hotel request for a 3-night GAP tour in Şanlıurfa
panel.requestsFailed: Could not publish the request, please try again.
panel.requestsNoBusiness: You must create a listing/business first.
panel.requestsForbidden: Permission error — request could not be created (contact an admin).
panel.requestsMineEmpty: You have not created any requests yet.
panel.requestsOpenEmpty: There are no open requests for your region or category right now.
panel.multipleCategoriesHint: You can select more than one service type.
panel.favoritesDescription: Business partners you saved for future work or quick access are listed here.
panel.favoritesEmptyDescription: Use “Save to favorites” on a business profile to add it here.
panel.favoriteLoginRequired: Sign in to save to favorites
panel.reviewsDescription: View reviews about your business and manage reviews you have written for partner companies.
panel.reviewsReceivedEmpty: Your business has not received any reviews yet.
panel.reviewsWrittenEmpty: You have not written any reviews yet. You can leave a review from a business profile.
panel.supportDescription: Contact the platform team about technical or operational issues and track your requests here.
panel.supportEmpty: You have no support requests yet.
panel.dopingDescription: Boosting moves your business higher in search results. View your current status below.
panel.dopingInactive: No boost is active right now. Your business is listed in organic order.
panel.dopingPremiumDescription: Paid permanent placement that keeps your business near the top of search results and increases brand visibility.
panel.dopingWelcomeDescription: An automatic 24-hour boost for every newly approved business. No action is required.
panel.dopingFooter: To purchase Premium boosting or request a timed package, create a <support>support request</support>. During the first phase, payments are handled outside the panel by contacting our team.
panel.formProgressHint: Complete the missing sections to prepare your listing for review.
panel.founderBadgeRequirement: Founder badge is shown only for 100% complete profiles, including an authorised contact and a business partner invite.
panel.viewsSub: Profile performance over the last 7 days
panel.viewsEmptyText: Complete and publish your listing to start tracking profile performance here.

resetPw.requestSub: Enter your email and we'll send you a password reset link.
resetPw.sent: Link sent. Please check your inbox.
resetPw.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
resetPw.rate: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
resetPw.newSub: Create a new password for your account.
resetPw.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPw.updated: Your password has been updated. You can log in now.
resetPw.sessionMissing: The link may have expired. Please request a new reset link.

helpPage.title: Get Help
helpPage.sub: Send us your question and our team will reply by email. Members can also use the Support section in their panel.
helpPage.name: Name / Company
helpPage.subject: Subject
helpPage.sent: Your message has been received. We will get back to you by email shortly.
helpPage.rate: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
helpPage.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
helpPage.otherPanelDesc: Members can open a ticket from their panel.

onboarding.title: One last step: your storefront photo
onboarding.sub: Add a cover image that best represents your business. Buyers see this first — a strong photo gets far more clicks.
onboarding.hint: JPG or PNG · landscape looks best

errors.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for may have moved or may never have existed.
errors.genericDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again; if the problem continues, come back a little later.

businessInvite.title: Business invitation
businessInvite.notFoundDescription: The link is missing or invalid. Ask the business administrator for a new invitation link.
businessInvite.expiredDescription: This secure link can no longer be used. The business administrator can send a new invitation from the admin panel.
businessInvite.revokedDescription: This invitation was revoked by an administrator. You need to request a new invitation link.
businessInvite.acceptedDescription: This invitation has already been used. You can continue to the dashboard with the business owner account.
businessInvite.introTitle: You have been granted management access to this business.
businessInvite.introDescription: Sign in with your account or create a new one. The existing business record will be linked directly to your dashboard.
businessInvite.verifyEmailNotice: A verification email was sent. Your business will be linked to your account when you open the link in the email.
businessInvite.differentAccount: Signed in with a different account
businessInvite.switchAccountCta: Sign in with the correct account
businessInvite.verifyDescription: We sent a verification link to {email}. Your business will be linked automatically when you open the link.
businessInvite.verifySpam: If the email has not arrived, check your spam folder. Refresh the page to send it again.
businessInvite.accountFoundTitle: An account already exists for this email
businessInvite.accountFoundDescription: Enter your existing password to claim the business instead of creating another account.
businessInvite.error_expired: This invitation has expired. Ask the business administrator for a new one.
businessInvite.error_email_mismatch: The signed-in account does not match the email address that received this invitation.
businessInvite.error_already_has_business: This account is already linked to another business.
businessInvite.error_business_claimed: This business has already been claimed by another account.
businessInvite.error_credentials: The password is incorrect. Try again.
businessInvite.error_password_short: The password must contain at least 8 characters.
businessInvite.error_account_exists: An account already exists for this email. Sign in from the existing-account section.
businessInvite.error_rate: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
businessInvite.error_signup_failed: The account could not be created. Please try again.
businessInvite.error_accept_failed: The business could not be claimed. Please try again.
businessInvite.errorDefault: The action could not be completed. Please try again.

membershipPopup.title: Welcome to the Global Tourism Network
membershipPopup.body: Join thousands of tourism professionals in one growing marketplace. Create your company profile, showcase your services and connect with business partners worldwide.
membershipPopup.leftBody: The global B2B marketplace that connects every part of the tourism industry.

benefits.title: Secure & Reliable
benefits.body: Your data is safe with us
